# 📝 Title of the PR - One Line Description

## List of Features/Fixes

- Add a list of features or fixes that are included in this PR
- This can be new API endpoints, database schema changes, background jobs, or performance improvements
- Or names of the bugs that are fixed as mentioned in the GitHub project board

## Code Level Changes

- List of major code-level changes that are done in this PR
- Include details about changes in controllers, services, repositories, or middleware
- Mention any significant refactors, optimizations, or security improvements
- Database migrations, cron jobs, or third-party service integrations should be highlighted
- Commit messages and descriptions can be used to fill this section

## Database & API Changes (if any)

- List any changes made to the database schema (new tables, columns, indexes, constraints, etc.)
- Mention any breaking changes in API responses, request payloads, or authentication flow
- Provide example request/response payloads if relevant

## Testing Guidelines

### Major Testing Points

- List of major testing points that are to be tested in this PR
- API endpoints that have been updated should be listed here
- Any business logic or service layer changes should be tested thoroughly
- Add any special edge cases that need to be tested

### Sanity Testing Points

- List of sanity testing points that are to be tested in this PR
- Any minor changes like renaming functions, refactoring helper methods, or logging improvements should be mentioned here
- Basic API response validation and error handling should be checked

## Software Engineer's Checklist

- [ ] Performed a review of my own code via `Files Changed` tab
- [ ] Verified API responses using Postman or equivalent tool
- [ ] No Server Errors in logs
- [ ] No Security Vulnerabilities or sensitive data exposure
- [ ] No Unused/Commented code, Console logs, or Debugging messages
- [ ] Database Migrations (if any) have been applied and tested

## 📸 Logs / API Response Samples

[Add relevant logs, API response examples, or database query outputs if required]

## 📝 Notes for Reviewer

[Add any notes for the reviewer here]
